creator: till@php.net
text:
While building rrdtool 1.3.3, I got the following (/usr/ports/databases/rrdtool):

configure: error: pixman >= 0.10.0 is required
(http://cairographics.org/releases/)
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.

I ran the suggested gnome loganalyzer script, it came out with no solution. Since my ports are up to date, I think the "fix" is to update the x11/pixman port since it currently at 0.9.6.

Otherwise it's blocking databases/rrdtool.

(On a sidenote, databases/rrdtool12 builds.)

Fix: 

Updated x11/pixman.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/databases/rrdtool
make
make install
